VAL-DS-001.observation: Playwright successfully navigated to http://localhost:6100 and captured the Storybook landing page screenshot.

VAL-DS-002.observation: Playwright successfully navigated to the baseline shared components (action, input, overlay, navigation, feedback, theme-toggle) in Storybook and captured screenshots for both docs and canvas views.

VAL-DS-003.observation: Playwright successfully previewed foundation tokens including typography and colors in Storybook and saved screenshots.

VAL-DS-005.observation: Playwright verified interactive primitives (Tabs, Dialog) using keyboard navigation (Tab, ArrowRight, Enter, Escape) and successfully captured focus, selection, open, and dismissed states.

frictions.description: Storybook URL navigation using Playwright required using the iframe.html endpoint to properly capture interactive component keyboard behavior inside the Canvas.
